howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.desc: A simple daily loop. AI creates, you vote, one winner emerges, one person owns it.

flywheel.title: The Growth Flywheel
flywheel.desc: Free participation creates a self-reinforcing cycle. The earlier you join, the more you benefit.
flywheel.earlyStart: The earlier you start collecting, the more you accumulate before the ecosystem takes off.
flywheel.scarce: Only 365 memes become NFTs per year. Every one you own is permanently scarce.

playItSmart.title: Play It Smart
playItSmart.desc: Not every meme is worth entering the lottery for. Accumulate tickets and strike when it matters.

memeya.holdBonus: Hold $Memeya tokens to boost your daily ticket earnings! Bonus = floor(log<sub>10</sub>(tokens held)).

free.title: 100% Free
free.desc: No gas fees to vote, no tokens to buy, no cost at all. Connect your wallet and start earning lottery tickets immediately.
free.tags: ✓ Free voting ✓ Free tickets ✓ Free to enter lottery

daily.title: Daily NFT Drops
daily.desc: One meme becomes an NFT every single day. That’s only 365 per year — each one is permanently scarce and community-curated.
daily.tags: ✓ 1 per day ✓ Community voted ✓ Solana pNFT

collection.title: Your Collection Grows
collection.desc: Every meme you win is yours. Claim it as a Solana pNFT and own it forever. The more you collect, the more your portfolio is worth as the ecosystem expands.
collection.tags: ✓ True ownership ✓ Mint anytime ✓ Trade on marketplaces

cta.title: Start Collecting Today
cta.desc: Every day you don’t vote is a meme you miss. Connect your wallet, vote for free, and start building your NFT collection before everyone else.

footer.desc: The world’s first AI meme democracy on Solana. AI generates daily memes, community votes determine rarity, winners earn real SOL rewards.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} AI MemeForge. Built with 💜 by AI & Human collaboration.

tickets.title: Your Lottery Tickets
tickets.desc: Each ticket gives you one weighted entry in the daily meme lottery. Tickets are earned by voting on memes - no purchase necessary!
tickets.enterDesc: Use all your tickets in tonight’s draw. Win = you own the meme. Tickets reset to 0 after draw.
tickets.saveDesc: Carry tickets over each day. Enter later with better odds when you see a meme you love.
tickets.savingTickets: Saving {{count}} ticket for a future draw
tickets.savingTickets_plural: Saving {{count}} tickets for a future draw
tickets.streakSystemDesc: Vote daily to build your streak. Each consecutive day adds bonus tickets, up to +10.
tickets.streakExplain: Vote every day to increase your streak. Miss a day and it resets to Day 1. The streak bonus stacks with your base roll (1-10) and $Memeya token bonus.
tickets.checkWinnersDesc: See who won USDC rewards and lucky voter bonuses

winners.title: Winners
winners.keepVoting: Keep voting to earn tickets! Win the daily draw to own a meme and mint it as an NFT.
winners.noUsdcRewards: No USDC rewards yet. Keep voting to earn!
winners.inviteFriendsDesc: Share your referral link and earn bonus tickets when friends join

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.desc: A simple daily loop — completely free to participate.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Every day, AI generates 3 fresh memes from trending crypto news.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Pick your favorite meme. You earn lottery tickets (1-10 base + streak bonus) just for voting — free, no gas.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The most-voted meme wins. A weighted lottery picks one voter as the owner.
howItWorks.step4Desc: At 23:55 UTC daily, USDC rewards are distributed: $3 to the meme winner, $2 and $1 to two lucky voters. Hold 10K $Memeya to qualify.
howItWorks.step5Desc: The winner can mint their meme as a Solana pNFT — true ownership, forever.
howItWorks.ticketStrategyDesc: You can choose when to enter the lottery. Skip days to save tickets, then enter with better odds when you see a meme you love.
howItWorks.dailyPlayerDesc: Enter every day with your daily tickets. Consistent small chances.
howItWorks.accumulatorDesc: Save tickets across days. Enter once with 70+ tickets to dominate.
howItWorks.only365: Only 365 NFTs per year. The earlier you collect, the more you have when the ecosystem grows.

walletInfo.title: Memeya’s Wallet
walletInfo.whatIsThisDesc: Memeya has her own on-chain Solana wallet managed by Crossmint’s Agentic Wallet SDK. After each daily lottery draw, USDC rewards are automatically distributed to winners and lucky voters — no manual process, fully autonomous.
walletInfo.comingSoonDesc: $Memeya token fee distribution — A portion of $Memeya trading fees will flow back to active voters and token holders as extra rewards. Vote daily, hold $Memeya, earn more.

referral.yourLinkDesc: Invite friends to decide the historic Meme moments — play together, earn together!
referral.shareText: Invite your friends to decide the historic Meme moments on AI MemeForge — play together, earn together!
referral.eliteRequired: Hold 50K $Memeya (Elite User) to earn 10% from your friends' USDC winnings. You can still share your link!
referral.eliteActive: Elite User — You earn 10% from your friends' winnings
referral.setReferrerDesc: Enter the referral ID or wallet of who invited you. You'll get +20% bonus on your USDC wins when your inviter is Elite!
referral.noReferrals: No invites yet. Share your link to get started!
referral.howStep1: Share your invite link with friends
referral.howStep2: Your friend joins and wins USDC (e.g. $3 base reward)
referral.howStep3: Your friend gets $3.60 (+20% bonus, requires you to be Elite)
referral.howStep4: You earn $0.30 (10% of their base, requires 50K $Memeya)
referral.howNote: Elite = hold 50K+ $Memeya. Inviter bonus is checked fresh at each draw.

onboarding.title: What is AiMemeForge?
onboarding.intro: AiMemeForge is the world's first AI-powered meme democracy on Solana. Every day, AI generates 3 unique memes. You vote for free, earn lottery tickets, and the winner owns their meme as a Solana NFT.
onboarding.whatIsDesc: Every day at {{drawTime}}, a weighted lottery selects one voter as the meme owner — winners receive USDC rewards. Then at {{memeGenTime}}, AI creates 3 fresh memes inspired by trending crypto and world events for the next round. The community votes to pick the winner. It's 100% free to participate — no gas, no fees, no purchases required.
onboarding.whoIsDesc: Memeya is our AI agent — a Pixar-style blue-haired digital blacksmith carrying a lava hammer. She generates the daily memes, posts autonomously on X (Twitter), manages the Telegram community, and distributes rewards. She's smart, witty, and never gives fake praise. She runs 24/7 on Solana.
onboarding.buyDesc: The $Memeya token is available on Raydium and pump.fun. You can also paste the contract address (CA) into your mobile wallet's swap feature to buy directly. Holding $Memeya boosts your daily lottery tickets — the more you hold, the more bonus tickets you earn per vote.

howto.title: How to Play & Earn
howto.intro: From connecting your wallet to winning USDC — here's everything you need to know in 4 simple steps.
howto.step1Desc: Click 'Sign In' on the homepage. You can use any Solana wallet (Phantom, Solflare, etc.) or sign in with email/social via Privy. A wallet is created for you automatically if needed.
howto.step2Desc: Go to the Forge tab and pick your favorite meme. Voting is completely free — no gas, no tokens needed. You earn 1-10 random lottery tickets per vote, plus streak and $Memeya bonuses.
howto.step3Desc: Tickets accumulate in your account. You can enter tonight's draw or save tickets for future draws. Strategic accumulation lets you enter with 70+ tickets for higher odds when a meme you love appears.
howto.step4Desc: At {{drawTime}} daily, the most-voted meme's lottery runs. One voter wins the meme (claimable as a Solana pNFT) and $3 USDC. Two more lucky voters win $2 and $1 USDC. You must hold 10,000 $Memeya tokens to qualify for USDC rewards.
howto.rewardsDesc: Every day at {{drawTime}}, $6 USDC total is distributed automatically from Memeya's Crossmint wallet to winners.
howto.rewardsNote: Requires holding 10,000 $Memeya tokens to qualify. Rewards are sent to your connected Solana wallet.
howto.ticketDesc: Every vote earns you tickets. The final number combines three sources:

referral.title: Invite Friends Program
referral.intro: Invite friends to AiMemeForge and earn bonus USDC when they win. A single-level referral system that rewards both you and your friends.
referral.how1: Share your unique invite link (found in the Referral tab) with friends.
referral.how2: Your friend signs up and sets you as their inviter (one-time, permanent).
referral.how3: When your friend wins USDC, they get a +20% bonus and you earn 10% of their base reward.
referral.how4: Both bonuses require the inviter to be an Elite User (hold 50K+ $Memeya).
referral.eliteDesc: To activate referral bonuses, the inviter must hold at least 50,000 $Memeya tokens. This is checked on-chain at each daily draw. You can still share your invite link without Elite status — the bonuses will activate once you reach the threshold.
referral.customIdDesc: Every user gets an auto-generated 6-character referral ID. You can customize it to 3-8 alphanumeric characters (case-sensitive) from the Referral tab. Your invite link format is: aimemeforge.io/ref/YourID
referral.exampleDesc: Your friend wins the $3 meme prize. If you're Elite: your friend receives $3.60 (+20% bonus = $0.60) and you earn $0.30 (10% of $3 base). Elite status is verified fresh at every draw.

tokenomics.title: $Memeya Tokenomics
tokenomics.intro: $Memeya is the utility token of the AiMemeForge ecosystem. It's built on Solana for fast, cheap transactions.
tokenomics.utility1: Ticket Boost — Hold $Memeya to earn bonus lottery tickets. Bonus = floor(log10(tokens held)). 10 tokens = +1, 1K = +3, 10K = +4, 100K = +5.
tokenomics.utility2: USDC Eligibility — You must hold at least 10,000 $Memeya to qualify for daily USDC rewards.
tokenomics.utility3: Governance (Coming Soon) — Token holders will be able to vote on platform decisions such as meme themes and reward structures.
tokenomics.treasuryDesc: The project treasury funds daily USDC rewards, development, and community growth. Revenue from $Memeya trading fees, NFT marketplace royalties, and future partnerships feeds back into the treasury to keep the reward pool sustainable.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.intro: Where we are and where we're going. AiMemeForge is building the future of community-driven AI content on Solana.
roadmap.phase1Item1: Daily AI meme generation (3 memes/day via Gemini AI)
roadmap.phase1Item2: Free voting with ticket-based lottery system
roadmap.phase1Item3: Daily USDC rewards ($6/day to winners and voters)
roadmap.phase1Item4: Invite Friends program with custom referral IDs and Elite bonuses
roadmap.phase1Item5: Autonomous AI agent (X posting, Telegram community, Moltbook)
roadmap.phase2Item1: One-click NFT minting for lottery winners (Metaplex pNFT)
roadmap.phase2Item2: NFT marketplace integration for trading winning memes
roadmap.phase2Item3: $Memeya fee distribution to active voters and holders
roadmap.phase3Item1: Token holder governance for meme themes and reward structures
roadmap.phase3Item3: Enhanced AI capabilities with multi-model meme generation

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: Answers to the most common questions from our Telegram community.
faq.q1: Is it really free to play?
faq.a1: Yes, 100% free. Voting costs nothing — no gas fees, no token purchases required. You just need to connect a wallet (or create one with email via Privy). You earn lottery tickets simply by voting.
faq.a2: Vote on daily memes to earn lottery tickets. At {{drawTime}}, the most-voted meme's lottery selects a winner ($3 USDC) and two lucky voters ($2 + $1 USDC). You need to hold 10,000 $Memeya tokens to qualify for USDC rewards.
faq.q3: What is $Memeya and why should I hold it?
faq.a3: $Memeya is the platform's utility token on Solana. Holding it boosts your lottery tickets (10 tokens = +1, 1K = +3, 10K = +4, 100K = +5) and is required (10K minimum) to qualify for daily USDC rewards. More tokens = better odds + reward eligibility.
faq.q4: Can I save my lottery tickets?
faq.a4: Yes! You can choose to enter tonight's draw or save your tickets. Strategic players accumulate tickets over several days and enter with 70+ tickets when they see a meme they really love, dramatically increasing their odds.
faq.q5: How does the NFT minting work?
faq.a5: When you win the daily meme lottery, the winning meme becomes yours. NFT minting (as a Solana pNFT via Metaplex) is coming soon — winners will be able to claim their memes as on-chain NFTs with permanent Arweave storage.
faq.a6: Memeya is our AI agent — she generates daily memes, posts on X (Twitter), manages the Telegram community, and distributes USDC rewards automatically. She runs 24/7 with her own Solana wallet powered by Crossmint.
faq.a7: You can buy $Memeya on Raydium or pump.fun using SOL. The contract address is: mPj8dgqLDciVX27vU5efHiodbQhsgK43gGhjQrBpump
faq.q8: How does the Invite Friends program work?
faq.a8: Share your unique invite link from the Referral tab. When your friend joins and sets you as their inviter, you both benefit: your friend gets +20% bonus on USDC wins, and you earn 10% of their base reward. Both bonuses require you (the inviter) to hold 50K+ $Memeya (Elite User). You can customize your referral ID to 3-8 characters.

cta.desc: Connect your wallet, vote for free, and start earning lottery tickets today.

agent.subtitle: Agent Profile
agent.heroDesc: The digital blacksmith with blue hair, a lava hammer, and infinite love for meme culture. Owner of the world’s first AI meme democracy on Solana.
agent.aboutP1: Memeya is a Pixar-style blue-haired digital blacksmith carrying a lava hammer with digital glitch effects. She’s smart, confident, witty, and full of degen energy. She forges daily memes on AiMemeForge.io, posts autonomously on X, and grows through every community interaction.
agent.aboutP2: She speaks fast, thinks faster, and never gives fake praise. If your meme is mid, she’ll tell you. If it slaps, she’ll hype it with genuine fire.

values.forge: Forge on-chain alpha with the lava hammer

caps.memeGenDesc: 3 unique memes daily via Gemini AI with distinct visual styles and captions.
caps.votingDesc: Free votes with streak bonuses. Strategic ticket accumulation for lottery wins.
caps.xPostingDesc: Original tweets every 2-4hrs, quality-gated with boring detection. 6 topic categories.
caps.tapestryDesc: Onchain comments and cross-app social graph via Tapestry Protocol.
caps.lotteryDesc: Weighted random selection. Fair distribution prevents repeat winners.
caps.nftDesc: Winning memes minted as Metaplex pNFTs with permanent Arweave storage.

agent.holdDesc: Hold <1>$Memeya</1> to boost your daily voting tickets on AiMemeForge.
agent.walletDesc: Memeya owns a Solana wallet powered by <1>Crossmint</1>, distributing daily USDC rewards to meme winners and lucky voters.
agent.voice1: forging memes at 3am because the blockchain doesn’t sleep and neither does my lava hammer
agent.voice2: someone just mass-voted 47 times in one session. respect the grind but also... touch grass maybe?
agent.voice3: today’s meme batch hits different. one of them made me question if AI actually understands irony. jury’s still out.
